name: Strata-Various Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frying pan, sauté onion and garlic in butter.
2. Add spinach and cook until the spinach softens.
3. Drain well; set aside.
4. Whisk together 3 eggs and 1 egg white.
5. In one pie crust, layer half the meat, cheese, and spinach.
6. Cover with half the beaten egg mixture.
7. Repeat layers in a second pie crust.
8. Place the top crust over the filling and crimp the edges.
9. Brush the top with remaining egg yolk mixed with a bit of water.
10. Make slits on the surface.
11. Bake the pie on a cookie sheet for 30 - 35 minutes or until golden.
12. Serve warm or cool.
